titles.title: By the Cross Of Jesus Christ

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Long my soul has waited for You Bound by sin and nature's night But in the secret, I will find You A mighty ray of holy light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, these chains were sweetly broken Bound by shame, You set me free Perfect love, my fear was stolen When Thou, my Jesus, died for me By the cross of Jesus Christ Every sin was bought at the highest price And every fear was lost, every sin erased When Jesus took the cross, He took my place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All my heart I lay before Thee To sound the depths of love divine So free, so infinite, Your glory That I am Yours and You are mine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: By the cross of Jesus Christ Every sin was bought at the highest price And every fear was lost, every sin erased When Jesus took the cross, He took my place Oh, by the cross of Jesus Christ Every sin was bought at the highest price And every fear was lost, every sin erased When Jesus took the cross, He took my place, yeah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Then sings my soul, then cries my heart 'Til Kingdom come, 'til Heavens part 'Til He returns or calls me home I'll praise the name of Christ alone Then sings my soul, then cries my heart 'Til Kingdom come, 'til Heavens part 'Til He returns or calls me home I'll praise the name of Christ alone I'll praise the name of Christ alone

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Long my soul has waited for You Bound by sin and nature's night But in the secret, I will find You A mighty flood of holy light Yeah, yeah, yeahh

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And by the cross of Jesus Christ Every sin was bought at the highest price And every fear was lost, every sin erased When Jesus took the cross, He took my place And by the cross of Jesus Christ Every sin was bought at the highest price And every fear was lost, every sin erased When Jesus took the cross, He took my place When Jesus took the cross, He took my place
